engine.measured_accuracy_note: 89.5% vs star-rating ground truth on DaleelStore reviews (same engine)
engine.single_number_warning: Sentiment depends on where you listen; comment corpus is praise-heavy — never quote one blended number.

intent.note: Size/price/availability questions = purchase intent. Most land on creator posts (no WhatsApp path to catch them).
